headline: Dow Taps Data Center Liquid Cooling Theme In AI Infrastructure Story
summary: Dow Inc. (NYSE:DOW) is being identified as a key supplier of liquid cooling fluids for data centers. The company is linked to the expanding use of liquid cooling as AI and cloud computing raise data center power density. This development highlights Dow's role in a segment tied to digital infrastructure demand. For you as an investor, the interest around Dow's position in data center liquid cooling sits on top of its broader chemicals and materials portfolio. As AI workloads and cloud...
